```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement prompt engineering best practices"
---
# Prompt Engineering
## Task
Design and optimize prompts for LLM interactions.
## Requirements
1. Use system prompts for persona and constraints. 2. Implement few-shot examples for consistency.
3. Use chain-of-thought for reasoning tasks. 4. Test prompts with diverse inputs.
5. Version prompts and track performance.
## Constraints
- Keep prompts concise but clear. Avoid prompt injection vulnerabilities. Test edge cases.
## Success Criteria
- Prompts produce consistent outputs. Edge cases handled. No injection vectors.
```
